artifacts.name: architect
artifacts.description: Records every significant technical decision as a numbered ADR so the team never asks "why did we build it this way?" again

artifacts.name: changelog-writer
artifacts.description: Never miss a release note again — reads task context or diffs and writes perfectly formatted CHANGELOG.md entries, every time, without being asked

artifacts.name: docs-writer
artifacts.description: Updates documentation after reviews pass

artifacts.name: drafter
artifacts.description: Drafts first-pass content from task context and audience

artifacts.name: echo-test
artifacts.description: Test-only agent for smoke tests — safe to delete

artifacts.name: editor
artifacts.description: Edits approved content for clarity, structure, style, and consistency

artifacts.name: fact-checker
artifacts.description: Verifies factual claims, links, numbers, and references in content drafts

artifacts.name: implementer
artifacts.description: Implements minimal code until tests pass (GREEN phase)

artifacts.name: planner
artifacts.description: Decomposes SPEC.md acceptance criteria into a structured TASKS.md

artifacts.name: reviewer-quality
artifacts.description: Reviews code quality and security

artifacts.name: reviewer-spec
artifacts.description: Verifies that implementation meets all acceptance criteria

artifacts.name: router
artifacts.description: Routes user intent to the correct workflow or agent based on task type

artifacts.name: test-writer
artifacts.description: Writes tests from specifications (RED phase)

artifacts.name: api-design
artifacts.description: Design REST APIs that last — OpenAPI 3.1 spec writing, versioning strategies, standard error schemas, pagination patterns, and a security checklist per endpoint

artifacts.name: code-translator
artifacts.description: Port code between programming languages the right way — idiomatically, not literally — with test suite verification before and after

artifacts.name: context-management
artifacts.description: Strategies for maintaining coherent context across long sessions and large codebases

artifacts.name: debugging
artifacts.description: Systematic debugging with hypothesis tracking

artifacts.name: design-tokens
artifacts.description: Extract magic values from CSS/SCSS into a token system — one source of truth for colors, spacing, and typography, with Tailwind and CSS custom properties output

artifacts.name: echo-test
artifacts.description: Test-only skill for smoke tests — safe to delete

artifacts.name: i18n
artifacts.description: Make any codebase internationalisation-ready — audits hardcoded strings, extracts them to locale files, replaces with i18n calls, and verifies completeness across all locales

artifacts.name: observability
artifacts.description: Structured logging and reasoning traces for agentic pipelines

artifacts.name: preview-delivery
artifacts.description: Build previews, share links or binaries, collect feedback, and iterate

artifacts.name: project-memory
artifacts.description: Maintain a structured knowledge base for your project — ADR decisions, CHANGELOG entries, and a known-issues log so context survives context resets, new sessions, and team turnover

artifacts.name: refactoring
artifacts.description: Safe refactoring with test coverage

artifacts.name: task-management
artifacts.description: Task system with backlog, specs, and task tracking

artifacts.name: text-translator
artifacts.description: Translate written content between human languages while preserving tone, meaning, and brand voice — with a glossary to keep terminology consistent

artifacts.name: artifact-factory
artifacts.description: Create and refine new agents, skills, and workflows as reusable building blocks

artifacts.name: bug-fix
artifacts.description: Structured pipeline for reproducing, fixing, and verifying a confirmed bug — with a mandatory regression test and changelog entry so it never comes back silently

artifacts.name: content-review
artifacts.description: Content creation with review pipeline

artifacts.name: echo-test
artifacts.description: Test-only workflow for smoke tests — safe to delete

artifacts.name: quality-baseline
artifacts.description: Raise any project to a quality baseline — test coverage, static analysis, security scan, documentation, observability, and CI/CD, all scored in a single prioritised report

artifacts.name: release
artifacts.description: Cut a clean, documented release in one pipeline — calculates the right SemVer bump, finalizes the CHANGELOG, updates version refs, commits, tags, and drafts release notes

artifacts.name: sdd-tdd
artifacts.description: Spec-Driven Development with TDD pipeline
